title: FlightDiscovery

whatItDoes: Lets users explore routes and compare flight options in a clean search flow.

title: Job Hunter
description: Application-tracking tool for structured job search execution.

title: QueerNomads
description: Inclusive travel product concept with community-centered direction.

title: Portfolio
